title: D2.4.9 – Quality system and associated SOPs for compositional evaluation
author: IFR
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Quality Flow chart on EuroFIR BASIS compilation, integration of original data   into the databank.  
 The steps and hazards in the EuroFIR BASIS compiliation process are identified in the following flow chart. An SOP is specified where a Standard Operation Procedure is required for a step in the compilation process. Critical control points CCP are also indicated.
